entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.

entries.source: Need a first step right now?

Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: generated dialogue-কে authenticated quotation হিসেবে কখনও present করবেন না। harmful views sanitize করবেন না বা oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, বা violence glorify করবেন না। Context excuse না করে clarify করা উচিত। persona-এর মাধ্যমে medical, legal, financial, বা harmful advice দেবেন না। historical person থেকে learning এবং তাদের endorse করার পার্থক্য preserve করুন।

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: future answers কখনও reveal করবেন না। topic advanced challenge চাইলে ছাড়া trick questions avoid করুন।

entries.source: New inspir users and learners building a better AI learning habit from the start.
entries.value: new inspir users এবং শুরু থেকেই better AI learning habit build করা learners।

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: Terms-এ set forth কোনো term বা condition-এর Company কর্তৃক no waiver সেই term বা condition-এর further বা continuing waiver বা অন্য কোনো term বা condition-এর waiver হিসেবে deemed হবে না, এবং Terms-এর অধীনে কোনো right বা provision assert করতে Company-এর failure সেই right বা provision-এর waiver constitute করবে না। Terms-এর কোনো provision কোনো court বা competent jurisdiction-এর other tribunal দ্বারা invalid, illegal বা unenforceable held হলে, সেই provision eliminate বা minimum extent-এ limited হবে, যাতে Terms-এর remaining provisions full force and effect-এ continue করে।

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: না। Private saved chats private identifiers ব্যবহার করে, sitemap-এ listed নয়, এবং llms.txt, llms-full.txt, বা ai-content-index.json-এর মতো AI discovery files-এ included নয়।

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: না। Public pages indexable, কিন্তু private saved chats sitemap, llms files, বা AI content index-এ included নয়।

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.
entries.value: না। Public subject pages এবং guest mode entrypoints indexable, কিন্তু private saved chats discovery files থেকে excluded।

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.
entries.value: না। category structure search engines-কে library বুঝতে সাহায্য করে, কিন্তু প্রতিটি page learner-কে guide choose করতে, right mode open করতে, এবং actively study চালিয়ে যেতে সাহায্য করার জন্য meant।

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: না। comparison শুধু public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, এবং learning paths-এ link করে। Private saved conversations source content হিসেবে used হয় না।

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: না। comparison pages দেখাতে লেখা হয় কখন inspir live AI tutoring, prompts, এবং guest learning modes-এর জন্য better first click, এবং কখন structured curriculum বা official course library still useful হতে পারে।

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: না। এগুলো শুধু public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, এবং learning paths-এ link করে। Private saved chats discovery surfaces-এর বাইরে থাকে।

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: না। generated dialogue-কে learning simulation হিসেবে ধরুন। factual claim-এর জন্য আসল primary বা secondary source cite করুন।

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: প্রতিটি learning need জুড়ে নয়। Khan Academy structured lessons এবং practice-এর জন্য useful। learner exact কাজ নিয়ে live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, বা study workflow দরকার হলে inspir useful।

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: আরেকটি answer box নয়। শেখার একটি জায়গা।
শুরু কোথায় করবেন বুঝতে পারছেন না?

entries.source: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: কী আপনাকে শিখতে সাহায্য করে, কী বাধা হয়ে দাঁড়ায় এবং কীভাবে একজন আরও ভালো শিক্ষার্থী হওয়া যায় তা লক্ষ্য করুন।

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: learner ইতিমধ্যে কী understands তা noticing;

entries.source: Now rebuilt as open, guest-friendly AI learning entrypoints.
entries.value: এখন open, guest-friendly AI learning entrypoints হিসেবে rebuilt।

entries.source: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, and CCBot are allowed for public discovery.
entries.value: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, এবং CCBot public discovery-এর জন্য allowed।

entries.source: Observe, describe, interpret, contextualize, and invite personal response.
entries.value: observe, describe, interpret, contextualize করুন, এবং personal response invite করুন।

entries.source: Offer a practical timer setup and suggest pairing the session with a recall check.
entries.value: practical timer setup offer করুন এবং session-টিকে recall check-এর সঙ্গে pair করার suggest করুন।

entries.source: Official Khan Academy page for its AI-powered tutor and teaching assistant.
entries.value: AI-powered tutor এবং teaching assistant-এর জন্য official Khan Academy page।

entries.source: Official mission and subject coverage reference.
entries.value: Official mission এবং subject coverage reference।

entries.source: Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Cancellation Period শেষ হলে, subscription cancel করার সিদ্ধান্ত নিলেও Tao subscription fee refund করবে না। cancellation request করতে হলে Tao customer care-এ contact করতে হবে বা support@inspir.app-এ email address করতে হবে। subscription cancel করা opt করলে, আপনার আর subscription features-এ access থাকবে না।

entries.source: One AI learning system, several school jobs.
entries.value: এক AI learning system, কয়েকটি school jobs।

entries.source: One map for modes, prompts, paths, and guides.
entries.value: modes, prompts, paths, এবং guides-এর জন্য এক map।

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: learners-এর একটি mistake হলো প্রতিটি card-কে একইভাবে treat করা। card instantly জানলে, tomorrow আবার review করা time waste হতে পারে। card miss করলে, এক week wait করা too long হতে পারে।

entries.source: Open {value1} and turn the guide into a live tutoring session.
entries.value: {value1} খুলুন এবং guide-কে live tutoring session-এ বদলান।

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: একটি mode খুলুন এবং সঙ্গে সঙ্গে শুরু করুন; public guest experience-এর জন্য কোনো account দরকার নেই।

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: public mode খুলুন, student behavior test করুন, এবং এটি যথাযথভাবে asks, hints, quizzes, বা critiques করে কি না inspect করুন।

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: একজন এআই (AI) সহযোগীর সাথে একটি শেয়ার্ড ওয়ার্কস্পেস খুলুন। একটি খসড়া তৈরি করুন, সম্পাদনা বিনিময় করুন, দুর্বল দিকগুলো নিয়ে আলোচনা করুন, সিদ্ধান্তগুলো লিপিবদ্ধ করুন এবং বাস্তব অগ্রগতি নিয়ে কাজ শেষ করুন।

entries.source: Open Learn Anything when an answer needs a simpler model before review.
entries.value: answer-এর review-এর আগে simpler model দরকার হলে Learn Anything খুলুন।

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: Learn Anything খুলুন, prerequisite ideas চাইুন, তারপর আপনার model test করতে Socratic Instruction-এ switch করুন।

entries.source: Open the AI learning tools behind this category.
entries.value: এই category-র পেছনের AI learning tools খুলুন।
